title: [Sanctum, Uncommon Paddock]
description: Blackened iron fencing encloses a broad paddock, its bars driven deep and rising in stark lines around the open space.  Great braziers burn at each corner, their heat drying the ground to brittle patches where grass once grew.  Along the far edge, a low outcropping of stone breaks the uniformity of the enclosure, its surface worn smooth by wind and age.
